results.title: Cybersecurity-Related Enforcement Under the False Claims Act in 2025: New Settlements, Same Lessons | Mintz
results.snippet: DOJ’s Civil Cyber-Fraud Initiative continues to drive FCA enforcement actions, with 2025 seeing multiple settlements primarily involving defense contractors and one significant health care case — signaling that cybersecurity compliance remains a focus for companies doing business with the government.

results.title: EU cybersecurity regulatory update for 2026 and beyond | ReedSmith
results.snippet: April 14, 2026 - What? The CER Directive creates a framework to strengthen the resilience of essential service providers against a range of threats. It complements NIS2 by focusing on physical resilience to risks such as natural disasters, terrorism and sabotage.

results.title: Everything You Need To Know About Cybersecurity Regulations In 2026 - PC Tech Magazine
results.snippet: March 17, 2026 - Cybersecurity compliance in 2026 goes beyond avoiding fines or meeting minimum standards. Organizations that treat regulation as a framework for smarter risk management often gain stronger credibility and operational stability.
